name: chain_i_made_100k_for_an_brand_in_under_2_mon
method:
I made $100K for an brand in under 2 months on TikTok Shop

- no wasted samples
- no lost time 
- no bs 
- no fluff

I put together a brand new comprehensive playbook I used to scale this brand with U

stages.task: Scrape TikTok Shop trending products, top UGC creator profiles, viral hooks with completion rates
Generate 5 AI UGC scripts per trending product using hook patterns from scrape. Use consequence-first and specific-number hooks from procedural memory
Route scripts to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/, cross-repurpose hooks for IG Reels and YouTube Shorts via content_repurposer.py
Compile weekly findings into sellable TikTok Shop UGC playbook update in DIGITAL_PRODUCTS/
